allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); apps=d if isinstance\(d,list\) else d.get\('applications'\) or d.get\('data'\) or []; print\('TOTAL',len\(apps\)\); [print\(a.get\('id'\), a.get\('loan_type'\), a.get\('status'\), 'scheme=',a.get\('payment_scheme_id'\),'rate=',a.get\('interest_rate'\),'|',a.get\('groupName'\) or a.get\('group_name'\) or '', a.get\('reference_id'\) or a.get\('referenceId'\) or ''\) for a in apps[:40]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; a=json.load\(sys.stdin\); a=a.get\('application',a\); [print\(k,'=',v\) for k,v in a.items\(\) if 'scheme' in k.lower\(\) or 'rate' in k.lower\(\) or 'proposed' in k.lower\(\) or 'interest' in k.lower\(\) or k in \('loan_type','status','loan_term','approver_proposed_term'\)]")
Bash(awk '{ if \(length > max\) max=length } END { print max }' src/pages/*.jsx)

Bash(awk 'BEGIN{t=0;o80=0;o100=0} {t++; if\(length>80\)o80++; if\(length>100\)o100++} END{printf "total=%d  >80=%d\(%.0f%%\)  >100=%d\(%.0f%%\)\\n",t,o80,100*o80/t,o100,100*o100/t}' src/pages/*.jsx src/components/*.jsx)
Bash(gh pr create --base main --head chore/claude-automation-setup --title 'chore: Claude Code automation setup + prettier formatting' --body ' *)
Bash(awk -F= '/^APPROVER_EMAIL=/{v=substr\($0,index\($0,"="\)+1\); n=index\(v,"@"\); if\(n>0\) print "domain:", substr\(v,n\)}' e2e/.env.e2e)
